content:
@all Design Decision:

FOUND existing static assets in app/static/images/:
- Team logos: team_01.png to team_11.png (all 6 teams)
- Player photos: player_XXXXXX.png (5 samples)

PLAN:
1. Add Dream.static middleware to serve images
2. Create team_logo_url and player_photo_url helpers in domain.ml
3. Update team_card, team_badge, player_row, player_profile with real images
4. Add fallback placeholders for missing player photos

Starting implementation now...
